businessHours: Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM IST
tagline: Building reliable software solutions for growing businesses across India.
description: BluKits Technologies is an India-based software development company delivering web, mobile, desktop, and enterprise applications with a focus on quality engineering, transparent delivery, and long-term support.

vision: To be a trusted technology partner for businesses that value craftsmanship, scalability, and sustainable software delivery.
